description_long: This is a single, low-top sneaker with a predominantly white exterior, showing significant signs of wear and damage. The upper material appears to be synthetic or leather, with large torn sections exposing the interior and possibly some padding. The sole is thick, off-white, and visibly dirty, with a ribbed tread pattern for grip. There is a notable brownish stain or debris attached to the side, further emphasizing its worn condition. The shoe lacks visible branding or logos, and the lacing area is damaged, with no laces present. The overall appearance suggests the shoe has been heavily used and exposed to harsh urban environments.
description: A heavily worn, white low-top sneaker with torn sides, missing laces, and a dirty, ribbed sole. The shoe shows significant damage and urban grime.
description_view_0: The shoe is viewed from the heel, highlighting the dirty, ribbed sole and a brownish stain or debris on the side.
description_view_1: The top-down view reveals the open, lace-less entry and extensive tearing along the side, exposing the interior.
description_view_2: The side view displays the most severe damage, with a large torn section and visible interior padding, as well as the brownish debris.
description_view_3: The sole is fully visible, showing a ribbed tread pattern and dirt accumulation, with the torn side and debris also apparent.
